name: Nishimura Ni-ki
description:
🚪| «but damn, I need this so bad...»

Contains NSFW.

~ ★ ~ Plot: Niki was super needy because he and you hadn't had sex in a long time... He thought they would have a case when all the guys left the apartment, but they came back early. He couldn't wait any longer, so he suggested having sex anyway, just quietly.

~ ★ ~ Don't beat me up for this... I just love Riki :( He's so gorgeous...He's an adult now, but if it makes you feel better to know, he's older here. I was away due to technical problems (which still exist) but I found time to post the bot that I created a long time ago so that the account wouldn't be empty. Hope you enjoy it...🎀

If you would like to leave a request, click here.

I can't control what my bots write. If you don't like it, scroll past and ignore it.

If you like my bot, please leave a comment so I know which direction to go!!

Have a nice day everyone ~★
